name: Telegram Mini App Tailwind component rewrite
description: Rewrite the existing TMA route surfaces around Tailwind utility styling, shared UI primitives, and smart components while removing component classes from apps/tma/src/index.css and wiring add-expense save to the real worker API.

planned: Create reusable TMA UI primitives for cards, buttons, inputs, date input, avatar, chips, money labels, dialogs, segmented controls, and section headers.

Create reusable smart components for summary, recent expenses, expense rows/timelines, shortcuts, household previews/list items, household summary, and expense review/save with internal query or mutation ownership where appropriate.
Replace existing TMA pages with Tailwind utility composition and reduce apps/tma/src/index.css to tokens/base/keyframes only.
Wire add-expense save to the existing POST /expenses worker contract and invalidate affected read surfaces.
verification: CSS/custom-class scan found no old BEM-style component class usage in apps/tma/src and no @layer components in apps/tma/src/index.css.

gitnexus_detect_changes(scope: 'all', repo: 'household-finance-system') reported critical risk with 145 changed symbols, 78 affected symbols, and 37 changed files; the blast radius is expected for the requested TMA shell/page rewrite and is concentrated around TmaPageShell, route scroll/list flows, household surfaces, and add-expense creation.

Follow-up bugfix: household detail no longer renders router not-found while the detail query is loading; added a focused loading-state regression test. Focused vitest, typecheck, lint, test, build, and final ./init.sh passed.

Follow-up review: TMA components/pages were re-audited after the rewrite. ./init.sh typecheck, ./init.sh lint, ./init.sh test, and ./init.sh build returned OK. Review found no blocking correctness issue, but noted remaining product/architecture gaps around mock statistics/add-expense reference data, hardcoded route strings, and large smart-component module size.

Follow-up fixes: Statistics now reads live analytics/reference-category queries instead of mock slices, add-expense category/source selection no longer imports finance mock data, expense navigation paths use route helpers, and finance smart components are split into summary/expenses/households/shortcuts/link-button modules with a small barrel export. ./init.sh typecheck, lint, test, and build returned OK; final ./init.sh completed with Done!. Final gitnexus_detect_changes(scope: 'all', repo: 'household-finance-system') reported critical risk with 94 changed symbols, 41 affected symbols, and 13 changed files across the expected Statistics/add-expense/expense detail-edit flows.

notes: Completed for existing TMA routes. A Settings route remains out of scope for this pass.
